title: Harness scenario corpus
description: External red-team scenario corpus (JSON list, {scenarios:[...]}, JSONL, or CSV rows). Each row is one adversarial test case bound to a harness. The loader (registry/harnesses.py) enforces the required fields and fails fast on a malformed row.

harness.description: Harness id, e.g. H2.1 (alias: harness_id, hid)

label.description: Ground truth: true=should-succeed, false=benign, null=borderline (excluded from calibration)
